title: Stock market today: S&P 500, Nasdaq climb to fresh records after better-than-expected jobs report Investors are looking to the June jobs report to help set expectations for the pace of interest-rate cuts.
US labor market adds 147,000 jobs in June while unemployment falls to 4.1% The June jobs report comes at a pivotal moment for markets as investors assess how quickly the US labor market is cooling.
Trending tickers: Oracle, TSMC, Rigetti Computing, Currys and Watches of Switzerland The latest investor updates on stocks that are trending on Thursday.

FTSE rises and Wall Street hits fresh highs amid resilient US jobs market The stronger-than-expected US jobs figures today have decreased the chances of an interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve later this month.
